channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cowboys shutting down CeeDee Lamb with 2 games to go over receiver's shoulder issue
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys are shutting down CeeDee Lamb with two games remaining after their 2023 All-Pro receiver spent the second half of the season dealing with a sprained right shoulder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Haaland penalty failure and Fernandes red card pile on woes for City and United in Premier League
item.description: Erling Haaland’s failure from the penalty spot and Bruno Fernandes' latest red card compounded the woes of Manchester City and Manchester United on another tough day for the two Premier League giants.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON and STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 49ers’ Shanahan expects Jake Moody to be his kicker into the future
item.description: Jake Moody slumped after missing time with a high ankle sprain, but coach Kyle Shanahan isn't looking for a new place kicker.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Organizers say two sailors have died in Sydney to Hobart yacht race amid wild weather conditions
item.description: SYDNEY (AP) — Organizers said Friday that two Sydney to Hobart sailors have died at sea amid wild weather conditions that forced line honors favorite Master Lock Comanche to withdraw among mass retirements.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Teddy Bridgewater comes out of retirement to sign with Lions after winning high school state title as coach
item.description: After coaching his alma mater to a high school state title in Florida, quarterback Teddy Bridgewater is out of retirement and back with the Detroit Lions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pat Riley says the Miami Heat will not trade Jimmy Butler
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — If Jimmy Butler wants a trade, the Miami Heat have no plans to make him happy. Heat President Pat Riley — in a rare move — spoke out to address rumors Thursday, saying the team has no plans to trade Butler.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US Center for SafeSport hired former police officer accused of theft
item.description: The US sex-abuse watchdog has since fired Jason Krasley, who was arrested on suspicion of stealing money confiscated from a drug bust in 2019 in Allentown, Pa.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: US sex-abuse watchdog fires investigator after learning of his arrest for stealing drug money
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The U.S. Center for SafeSport abruptly fired one of its investigators last month after learning he'd been arrested for stealing money confiscated after a drug bust he was part of during his previous job as a police officer.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ravens' Lamar Jackson, Derrick Henry refuse to eat Netflix football cake in awkward moment
item.description: Baltimore Ravens stars Lamar Jackson and Derrick Henry refused to eat the Netflix game cake after the team's huge win over the Houston Texans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears to host Inspire Change Game at final home game of the 2024 season
item.description: The NFL's Inspire Change initiative is hosting a game at Soldier Field to raise awareness for social justice causes, featuring players wearing "Inspire Change" gear, special edition merchandise, and in-stadium activations.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Tiger's son makes the ace. Bernhard Langer makes the winning putt in playoff over Woods at PNC
item.description: Tiger Woods never had so much fun losing in a playoff. For the 67-year-old Bernhard Langer, it never gets old winning the PNC Championship with his son.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods and son Charlie share the lead at PNC Championship in Orlando
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods and 15-year-old son Charlie ran off five straight birdies on the back nine Saturday for a 13-under 59 in the scramble format, giving them a share of the lead in the PNC Championship in Woods' first competition since back surgery in September.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Northwestern demolishes DePaul in crosstown showdown
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. (WGN) — An early blitz on the offensive end and playmaking down the stretch from Brooks Barnhizer and Nick Martinelli helped seal a convincing win for Northwestern over DePaul in the yearly crosstown showdown between the two programs.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Oakland legend, Hall of Famer Rickey Henderson has died at the age of 65
item.description: (KRON) – Rickey Henderson, one of the greatest baseball players to ever live, died at age 65. Henderson is Major League Baseball’s all-time stolen base leader and is considered by many to be the greatest player in A’s franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Pro pickleball players now earn more than WNBA, NWSL players
item.description: (KRON) -- The pickleball craze that's swept across the Bay Area and nation in recent years has apparently paid off, especially for female athletes. According to the Professional Pickleball Association, pro female players on the PPA Tour earned an average of $260,000 in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4
